title: BIU - جامعة بيروت الإسلامية- كلية الشريعة
evidence_summary: Official BIU homepage navigation exposes Master's, Doctorate, admission, tuition, thesis/dissertation, and postgraduate student links.

title: متطلبات التسجيل لمرحلة الماجستير
evidence_summary: Official Master's stage page describes the specialization stage, names Master's-level tracks/specializations, duration, thesis requirement, and admission conditions.

title: متطلبات التسجيل مرحلة العالمية الدكتوراه
evidence_summary: Official Doctorate stage page states doctorate study, three-year dissertation preparation, publication requirement, and admission limited to holders of the Master's specialization in the same field.

title: متطلبات التسجيل
evidence_summary: Official admission requirements page lists required documents for Master's, preparatory Master's, and Doctorate stages.

title: طلبات التسجيل
evidence_summary: Official applications page links registration forms for Master's, preparatory Master's, and Doctorate stages.

title: توصيف المواد
evidence_summary: Official course-description index contains a postgraduate section listing Islamic Studies, Comparative Fiqh, Sharia Judiciary Master's, and preparatory Master's tracks.

title: أسماء الكتب - السنة التحضيرية للماجستير شعبة الدراسات الإسلامية
evidence_summary: Official books page lists 2025-2026 preparatory Master's materials for Islamic Studies.

title: إرشادات مهمة لطلاب الماجستير والدكتوراه
evidence_summary: Official postgraduate guidance page gives research plan, thesis/dissertation format, and source-reference guidance for Master's and Doctorate students.

title: انجازات الكلية
evidence_summary: Official achievements page states 2006 recognition for granting Master's specializations and Doctorate in Comparative Fiqh, Usul al-Fiqh, and Islamic Studies.

title: الأقساط السنوية
evidence_summary: Official tuition page states annual fees for academic year 1447 / 2025-2026, but the fee table is rendered as an image in the captured text.

title: جدول المحاضرات
evidence_summary: Official lecture schedule page exists, but the captured content did not expose current schedule details.

title: جدول الامتحانات
evidence_summary: Official exam schedule page exists; captured content indicates an official page but did not expose complete exam details.

title: النظام الداخلي
evidence_summary: Official internal regulations page was included in the recursive inspection for graduate regulation coverage.
